TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-frog_sinay
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: hang misakamu kaku muliyaw aca a mahiza.
S.PHON: ħaŋ misakamu kaku mur~ɾijaw aʦa a maħiza.
S.FORM: hang misakamu kaku muliyaw aca a mahiza.
S.PHON: ħaŋ misakamu kaku mur~ɾijaw aʦa a maħiza.
S.TRANSL: 我要重複剛剛說的.
I would repeat what I said.

S.FORM: cay pimelaw tu cudad i mahini.
S.PHON: ʦaj pimər~ɾaw tu ʦudad i maħini.
S.FORM: cay pimelaw tu cudad i mahini.
S.PHON: ʦaj pimər~ɾaw tu ʦudad i maħini.
S.TRANSL: 我不看書.
I would not read a book.

S.FORM: E ina wawa tuyni u melawen nu maku sa tatenga' tada u mapamulay nuyni u ina a tu ama sa kaku mimelaw.
S.PHON: ə ina wawa tujni u mər~ɾawən nu maku sa tatəŋaʔ~ʡ tada u mapamur~ɾaj nujni u ina a tu ama sa kaku mimər~ɾaw.
S.FORM: E ina wawa tuyni u melawen nu maku sa tatenga' tada u mapamulay nuyni u ina a tu ama sa kaku mimelaw.
S.PHON: ə ina wawa tujni u mər~ɾawən nu maku sa tatəŋaʔ~ʡ tada u mapamur~ɾaj nujni u ina a tu ama sa kaku mimər~ɾaw.
S.TRANSL: 依我來看,那小孩真的被父母親遺棄趕走.
In my opinion, that child was really abandoned by his/her parents.

S.FORM: u wawa hananay u wawa hananay satapang a balaki i tini i hiya ita u tamdaw.
S.PHON: u wawa ħananaj u wawa ħananaj satapaŋ a bar~ɾaki i tini i ħija ita u tamdaw.
S.FORM: u wawa hananay u wawa hananay satapang a balaki i tini i hiya ita u tamdaw.
S.PHON: u wawa ħananaj u wawa ħananaj satapaŋ a bar~ɾaki i tini i ħija ita u tamdaw.
S.TRANSL: 我們在這長大.
We grew up here.

S.FORM: namakaini nilecu' nuyni u nu ina kya.
S.PHON: namakaini nir~ɾəʦuʔ~ʡ nujni u nu ina kja.
S.FORM: namakaini nilecu' nuyni u nu ina kya.
S.PHON: namakaini nir~ɾəʦuʔ~ʡ nujni u nu ina kja.
S.TRANSL: 是媽媽生的啊.
were born by mother.

S.FORM: i tatenga' adiwawa hiza adiwawa hang anu ca'ay katineng tu ina a tu ama.
S.PHON: i tatəŋaʔ~ʡ adiwawa ħiza adiwawa ħaŋ anu ʦaʔ~ʡaj katinəŋ tu ina a tu ama.
S.FORM: i tatenga' adiwawa hiza adiwawa hang anu ca'ay katineng tu ina a tu ama.
S.PHON: i tatəŋaʔ~ʡ adiwawa ħiza adiwawa ħaŋ anu ʦaʔ~ʡaj katinəŋ tu ina a tu ama.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子不照顧父母親.
Children did not take care of parents.

S.FORM: misikul pahabay tuyni u wawa kya.
S.PHON: misikur~ɾ paħabaj tujni u wawa kja.
S.FORM: misikul pahabay tuyni u wawa kya.
S.PHON: misikur~ɾ paħabaj tujni u wawa kja.
S.TRANSL: 養小孩.
fed children.

S.FORM: ca'ay kakapah ku uzip nu wawa sa kaku.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡaj kakapaħ ku uzip nu wawa sa kaku.
S.FORM: ca'ay kakapah ku uzip nu wawa sa kaku.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡaj kakapaħ ku uzip nu wawa sa kaku.
S.TRANSL: 我認為小孩身體不好.
I thought the child was weak.

S.FORM: uyni hantu u balaut.
S.PHON: ujni ħantu u bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: uyni hantu u balaut.
S.PHON: ujni ħantu u bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 這隻青蛙呢?
How about this frog?

S.FORM: u maku a katinengan i u kapahay a malusapaiyo nuyni u mangeliay nu kuku' nuyni u lima' kuyni u balaut.
S.PHON: u maku a katinəŋan i u kapaħaj a mar~ɾusapaijo nujni u maŋər~ɾiaj nu kukuʔ~ʡ nujni u r~ɾimaʔ~ʡ kujni u bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: u maku a katinengan i u kapahay a malusapaiyo nuyni u mangeliay nu kuku' nuyni u lima' kuyni u balaut.
S.PHON: u maku a katinəŋan i u kapaħaj a mar~ɾusapaijo nujni u maŋər~ɾiaj nu kukuʔ~ʡ nujni u r~ɾimaʔ~ʡ kujni u bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 據我所知手腳斷掉時,青蛙是很好的藥.
In my opinion, frog was a good medicine for broken legs and hands.

S.FORM: anu masuni' kuyni u balaut kya a i tawtawya kaudadan kuyni u kasuni' nu balaut sa.
S.PHON: anu masuniʔ~ʡ kujni u bar~ɾaut kja a i tawtawja kaudadan kujni u kasuniʔ~ʡ nu bar~ɾaut sa.
S.FORM: anu masuni' kuyni u balaut kya a i tawtawya kaudadan kuyni u kasuni' nu balaut sa.
S.PHON: anu masuniʔ~ʡ kujni u bar~ɾaut kja a i tawtawja kaudadan kujni u kasuniʔ~ʡ nu bar~ɾaut sa.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙叫的那時候,當場就會下雨了.
The moment frogs croaked, it would rain.

S.FORM: i tawyaay a tamdaw tahkal mikilim tuyni u balaut.
S.PHON: i tawjaaj a tamdaw taħkar~ɾ mikir~ɾim tujni u bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: i tawyaay a tamdaw tahkal mikilim tuyni u balaut.
S.PHON: i tawjaaj a tamdaw taħkar~ɾ mikir~ɾim tujni u bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 那時候,人會出來找青蛙.
At that time, people would go out to look for frogs.

S.FORM: asu' salami'en.
S.PHON: asuʔ~ʡ sar~ɾamiʔ~ʡən.
S.FORM: asu' salami'en.
S.PHON: asuʔ~ʡ sar~ɾamiʔ~ʡən.
S.TRANSL: 菜好吃.
The food was delicious.

S.FORM: asu' ku kabi.
S.PHON: asuʔ~ʡ ku kabi.
S.FORM: asu' ku kabi.
S.PHON: asuʔ~ʡ ku kabi.
S.TRANSL: 湯好喝.
The soup was good.

S.FORM: anu tuktuken kuyza u hiya simanta' han mupekpek kya.
S.PHON: anu tuktukən kujza u ħija simantaʔ~ʡ ħan mupəkpək kja.
S.FORM: anu tuktuken kuyza u hiya simanta' han mupekpek kya.
S.PHON: anu tuktukən kujza u ħija simantaʔ~ʡ ħan mupəkpək kja.
S.TRANSL: 把那個敲一敲,生的再捶一捶.

TRANSL.notes: (We) beat it and then pounded the raw meet.

S.TRANSL: beat it and then pounded the raw meet.

S.FORM: tatenga' pazepit hantu i tini mangeliay a kuku' ya u lima' aca.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ pazəpit ħantu i tini maŋər~ɾiaj a kukuʔ~ʡ ja u r~ɾimaʔ~ʡ aʦa.
S.FORM: tatenga' pazepit hantu i tini mangeliay a kuku' ya u lima' aca.
S.PHON: tatəŋaʔ~ʡ pazəpit ħantu i tini maŋər~ɾiaj a kukuʔ~ʡ ja u r~ɾimaʔ~ʡ aʦa.
S.TRANSL: 貼在腳斷手斷的地方.

TRANSL.notes: (We) pasted on the broken parts, such as legs and hands.

S.TRANSL: pasted on the broken parts, such as legs and hands.

S.FORM: kalamkam mangaay.
S.PHON: kar~ɾamkam maŋaaj.
S.FORM: kalamkam mangaay.
S.PHON: kar~ɾamkam maŋaaj.

TRANSL.notes: ngaay 指生病之後復原的好,而一般的好(good)為kapah.

S.TRANSL: ngaay 指生病之後復原的好,而一般的好 為kapah.
It recovered soon.

S.FORM: ya han nu maku ku kamu.
S.PHON: ja ħan nu maku ku kamu.
S.FORM: ya han nu maku ku kamu.
S.PHON: ja ħan nu maku ku kamu.
S.TRANSL: 我說的就這樣.
This is what I would say.

S.FORM: sa uyni hantu u wawa anu tacuwacuwa kuyni u babalaki a ca'ay ku papamulen nu mita.
S.PHON: sa ujni ħantu u wawa anu taʦuwaʦuwa kujni u babar~ɾaki a ʦaʔ~ʡaj ku papamur~ɾən nu mita.
S.FORM: sa uyni hantu u wawa anu tacuwacuwa kuyni u babalaki a ca'ay ku papamulen nu mita.
S.PHON: sa ujni ħantu u wawa anu taʦuwaʦuwa kujni u babar~ɾaki a ʦaʔ~ʡaj ku papamur~ɾən nu mita.
S.TRANSL: 老人不管到哪裡,我們都不可以放走.
Wherever senior citizens went, we could not let them go.

S.FORM: aca'ay kapawan kita tuyni u wawa.
S.PHON: aʦaʔ~ʡaj kapawan kita tujni u wawa.
S.FORM: aca'ay kapawan kita tuyni u wawa.
S.PHON: aʦaʔ~ʡaj kapawan kita tujni u wawa.
S.TRANSL: 我們不能忘記孩子.
We could not forget children.

S.FORM: anu mapawan kita kya tatenga' malahedaw maala nuyni nu taw kuyni u wawa.
S.PHON: anu mapawan kita kja tatəŋaʔ~ʡ mar~ɾaħədaw maar~ɾa nujni nu taw kujni u wawa.
S.FORM: anu mapawan kita kya tatenga' malahedaw maala nuyni nu taw kuyni u wawa.
S.PHON: anu mapawan kita kja tatəŋaʔ~ʡ mar~ɾaħədaw maar~ɾa nujni nu taw kujni u wawa.
S.TRANSL: 如果我們忘記,小孩子真的會被別人帶走.
If we forgot it, children would be taken away.

S.FORM: anu matepadtepad sa patacuwaentu kuni pahabayan nu maku.
S.PHON: anu matəpadtəpad sa pataʦuwaəntu kuni paħabajan nu maku.
S.FORM: anu matepadtepad sa patacuwaentu kuni pahabayan nu maku.
S.PHON: anu matəpadtəpad sa pataʦuwaəntu kuni paħabajan nu maku.
S.TRANSL: 我辛苦養育的就沒有了.
The children whom I raised disappeared.

W.TRANSL: 使動-去-哪裡-受焦=完成貌

S.FORM: asatu aca ku taw.
S.PHON: asatu aʦa ku taw.
S.FORM: asatu aca ku taw.
S.PHON: asatu aʦa ku taw.
S.TRANSL: 別人也會這樣說.
Other people would say so.

S.FORM: u kakalibutan ku mahiniay a demak.
S.PHON: u kakar~ɾibutan ku maħiniaj a dəmak.
S.FORM: u kakalibutan ku mahiniay a demak.
S.PHON: u kakar~ɾibutan ku maħiniaj a dəmak.
S.TRANSL: 「煩」原為ma-libut;demak「事情」為阿美語,撒奇萊雅語則為kawaw.
This thing was annoying.

S.FORM: malahedaw kuyni u wawa.
S.PHON: mar~ɾaħədaw kujni u wawa.
S.FORM: malahedaw kuyni u wawa.
S.PHON: mar~ɾaħədaw kujni u wawa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子不見了.
The child disappeared.

S.FORM: han nu maku mamelaw ita kuyni u ngabul i tini i i cudad.
S.PHON: ħan nu maku mamər~ɾaw ita kujni u ŋabur~ɾ i tini i i ʦudad.
S.FORM: han nu maku mamelaw ita kuyni u ngabul i tini i i cudad.
S.PHON: ħan nu maku mamər~ɾaw ita kujni u ŋabur~ɾ i tini i i ʦudad.
S.TRANSL: 我這樣講.我們在書中看到了鹿.
I would say this and we saw deer in a book.

S.FORM: u ngabul sa u u angicen nu babalaki yu mahiza henay.
S.PHON: u ŋabur~ɾ sa u u aŋiʦən nu babar~ɾaki ju maħiza ħənaj.
S.FORM: u ngabul sa u u angicen nu babalaki yu mahiza henay.
S.PHON: u ŋabur~ɾ sa u u aŋiʦən nu babar~ɾaki ju maħiza ħənaj.
S.TRANSL: 以前鹿是老人家最渴望的.
Deer was the animal that the senior citizens were longing for.

S.FORM: u sapaiyo kuyni u ngawa' nuyni u ngabul.
S.PHON: u sapaijo kujni u ŋawaʔ~ʡ nujni u ŋabur~ɾ.
S.FORM: u sapaiyo kuyni u ngawa' nuyni u ngabul.
S.PHON: u sapaijo kujni u ŋawaʔ~ʡ nujni u ŋabur~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 鹿角是藥.
Antler was a type of medicine.

S.FORM: han nu maku sa.
S.PHON: ħan nu maku sa.
S.FORM: han nu maku sa.
S.PHON: ħan nu maku sa.
S.TRANSL: 我是這樣說的.
This was what I said.

S.FORM: u itatu nu mita i mahini sa sikamutu kuyni u pabaw tuyni u aadupen ca'aytu ku maadup i mahini.
S.PHON: u itatu nu mita i maħini sa sikamutu kujni u pabaw tujni u aadupən ʦaʔ~ʡajtu ku maadup i maħini.
S.FORM: u itatu nu mita i mahini sa sikamutu kuyni u pabaw tuyni u aadupen ca'aytu ku maadup i mahini.
S.PHON: u itatu nu mita i maħini sa sikamutu kujni u pabaw tujni u aadupən ʦaʔ~ʡajtu ku maadup i maħini.
S.TRANSL: 有人說政府現在不准打獵.
Some one said that our government prohibited hunting.

S.FORM: amanatu piadup sa yu mahiza henay i tawya henay a babalaki kya miadup mana uh tabuyubuyu'.
S.PHON: amanatu piadup sa ju maħiza ħənaj i tawja ħənaj a babar~ɾaki kja miadup mana uħ tabujubujuʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: amanatu piadup sa yu mahiza henay i tawya henay a babalaki kya miadup mana uh tabuyubuyu'.
S.PHON: amanatu piadup sa ju maħiza ħənaj i tawja ħənaj a babar~ɾaki kja miadup mana uħ tabujubujuʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 那時候不能打獵,老人家都到深山去打獵.
Hunting was forbidden at that time, but at that time, senior citizens would go hunting in mountains.

S.FORM: anu mahamintu kuyni u kawaw tabuyubuyu'tu miadup mibihkac.
S.PHON: anu maħamintu kujni u kawaw tabujubujuʔ~ʡtu miadup mibiħkaʦ.
S.FORM: anu mahamintu kuyni u kawaw tabuyubuyu'tu miadup mibihkac.
S.PHON: anu maħamintu kujni u kawaw tabujubujuʔ~ʡtu miadup mibiħkaʦ.
S.TRANSL: 事情完成之後,去深山打獵,用箭射.
After they finished, they went hunting in mountains and shot.

S.FORM: mahizaay ku i tawyaay a nikauzip.
S.PHON: maħizaaj ku i tawjaaj a nikauzip.
S.FORM: mahizaay ku i tawyaay a nikauzip.
S.PHON: maħizaaj ku i tawjaaj a nikauzip.
S.TRANSL: 那時候的生活就是這樣.
It was the life at that time.

S.FORM: ayzaay a wawa sa i tinitu mamin i hkal mikuli.
S.PHON: ajzaaj a wawa sa i tinitu mamin i ħkar~ɾ mikur~ɾi.
S.FORM: ayzaay a wawa sa i tinitu mamin i hkal mikuli.
S.PHON: ajzaaj a wawa sa i tinitu mamin i ħkar~ɾ mikur~ɾi.
S.TRANSL: 現在的小孩都出去工作了.
Now child went out to work.

S.FORM: anu yadah kuyni u paysu a kya u sapapicudad tuyni u wawa.
S.PHON: anu jadaħ kujni u pajsu a kja u sapapiʦudad tujni u wawa.
S.FORM: anu yadah kuyni u paysu a kya u sapapicudad tuyni u wawa.
S.PHON: anu jadaħ kujni u pajsu a kja u sapapiʦudad tujni u wawa.
S.TRANSL: 如果有很多錢的話,就給小孩子讀書.
If there was a lot of money, it was for children to study.

S.FORM: tayni i tabakiay a cacudadan i sa kuyu balucu' mahiniay a nikauzip sa.
S.PHON: tajni i tabakiaj a ʦaʦudadan i sa kuju bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ maħiniaj a nikauzip sa.
S.FORM: tayni i tabakiay a cacudadan i sa kuyu balucu' mahiniay a nikauzip sa.
S.PHON: tajni i tabakiaj a ʦaʦudadan i sa kuju bar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡ maħiniaj a nikauzip sa.
S.TRANSL: 有心要送去大學唸書,會過像這樣的生活.
If they intended to send children to university, they would live a life like that.

S.FORM: caytu katayni i hkal misakudukuduh.
S.PHON: ʦajtu katajni i ħkar~ɾ misakudukuduħ.
S.FORM: caytu katayni i hkal misakudukuduh.
S.PHON: ʦajtu katajni i ħkar~ɾ misakudukuduħ.
S.TRANSL: 不出去的就做手工藝.
People who did not leave did handcraft.

S.FORM: han nu maku kuyni u kamu sa.
S.PHON: ħan nu maku kujni u kamu sa.
S.FORM: han nu maku kuyni u kamu sa.
S.PHON: ħan nu maku kujni u kamu sa.
S.TRANSL: 我就這樣說.
This was what I would say.

S.FORM: a u canan kuyni u kamu hatiza kuyni u kamu nu maku.
S.PHON: a u ʦanan kujni u kamu ħatiza kujni u kamu nu maku.
S.FORM: a u canan kuyni u kamu hatiza kuyni u kamu nu maku.
S.PHON: a u ʦanan kujni u kamu ħatiza kujni u kamu nu maku.

TRANSL.notes: IU 108 中,ha-加上方向指示詞tini (這裡)及 tiza (那裡),則變成限定用法,

S.TRANSL: IU 108 中,ha-加上方向指示詞tini 及 tiza ,則變成限定用法,
What else can I say? That's it.
